description: skill-concierge — SKILL-FIRST doctrine + semantic enforcer + invocation ledger + index self-heal + override self-heal + flywheel self-heal. SessionStart: inject the full standing-order doctrine (doctrine.py, read from hooks/doctrine/skill-first.md), fire a detached/throttled incremental reindex so the index self-refreshes (auto_reindex.py), reconcile the settings.json skillOverrides on drift (auto_overrides.py), and — if a flywheel LLM endpoint is configured and reachable — fire a detached/throttled/capped retrieval-flywheel generation run (auto_flywheel.py, default ON via SKILL_AUTO_FLYWHEEL, fail-open when unconfigured). UserPromptSubmit: inject the cheap per-turn gate trigger + semantic top-k candidates (enforcer) and log turns/manual use (ledger). PostToolUse: log Claude's auto skill / semantic-search invocations. Fail-silent, additive-only. No post-turn gate — governance is in-generation, caveman-style.
